name: Cabbage Soup with Paprika, Kielbasa and Raisins
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds cabbage, cored, cut into 1-inch-wide strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy-bottomed soup pot, heat bacon over medium heat. Sauté until most of the fat is rendered.
2. Add onions and garlic; sauté until onion is tender.
3. Add cabbage and paprika, stirring to mix well. Sauté until combined.
4. Add stock and bring to a boil, stirring.
5. Using your hand, squeeze most of the juice from tomatoes and add them in coarse chunks.
6. When mixture comes to a boil, lower heat to simmering and cook for 15 minutes.
7. Add raisins and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Add kielbasa and simmer until sausage slices are warm, about 3 minutes.
9. Divide soup among 4 soup bowls and sprinkle with parsley.
Yield: 4 servings
